title: satureja acinos var. lancifolia
intro: Satureja acinos var. lancifolia, also known as piney savory, is a variety of the satureja acinos plant, a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Satureja acinos var. lancifolia include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin care. Satureja acinos var. lancifolia can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested for its medicinal benefits.
